input.pr_description: Introduce read-through cache to reduce checkout latency.
input.diff_summary: Added cache layer for checkout reads and tuned TTL.

output.short_summary: Reduced checkout latency by optimizing cache reads in the payments service.
output.pm_summary: This update introduces a read-through cache for checkout requests, improving response times during peak traffic.
output.exec_summary: Performance gains improve checkout reliability and customer experience during high-traffic periods.
risks: Cache invalidation updates require monitoring post-deploy.
output.customer_impact: Faster checkout responses for high-volume users.

input.pr_description: Reduce payload size for analytics queries to lower API cost.
input.diff_summary: Removed unused fields and added column projection for analytics queries.

output.short_summary: Lowered analytics query cost by reducing payload size.
output.pm_summary: This change trims analytics query payloads, reducing API cost while keeping the same reporting output.
output.exec_summary: Cost optimization reduces ongoing analytics spend without impacting reporting outcomes.
output.customer_impact: No user-facing change; reporting performance may feel faster.

input.pr_description: Provide structured error responses for invalid checkout requests.
input.diff_summary: Added validation errors with user-friendly messages for invalid input.

output.short_summary: Improved checkout errors with clearer, actionable responses.
output.pm_summary: Users now receive structured, readable error messages during checkout, reducing confusion and support load.
output.exec_summary: Clearer error handling improves conversion reliability by reducing checkout friction.
risks: New validation paths may block edge-case inputs; monitor error rate.

input.pr_description: Migrate uploads to cloud object storage to improve scalability.
input.diff_summary: Switched upload storage to managed object storage with signed URLs.

output.short_summary: Improved upload scalability by moving storage to managed object storage.
output.pm_summary: Uploads now use managed object storage, enabling higher throughput during spikes and reducing bottlenecks.
output.exec_summary: Scalability improvements reduce upload delays as user volume grows.
risks: Storage credential misconfig could cause upload errors; verify rollout.

input.pr_description: Move API keys to environment variables.
input.diff_summary: Replaced hardcoded keys with env var lookups and added .env example.

output.short_summary: Improved security by removing hardcoded secrets.
output.pm_summary: Secrets are now sourced from environment variables, reducing risk of accidental exposure.
output.exec_summary: Security hardening reduces the risk of credential leakage.
risks: Ensure deployment environment sets required variables.

input.pr_title: Add lazy loading for dashboard widgets
input.pr_description: Load heavy widgets on demand for the dashboard.
input.diff_summary: Introduced lazy loading and skeleton states for analytics widgets.

output.short_summary: Improved dashboard load time with lazy-loaded widgets.
output.pm_summary: The dashboard now loads core content faster while deferring heavy widgets, reducing time to first view.
output.exec_summary: Faster dashboards improve perceived performance and reduce user friction.
risks: Lazy-loaded widgets may delay insights on slow networks.

input.pr_title: Add rate limiting to auth endpoint
input.diff_summary: Implemented rate limiting and logging for auth requests.

output.short_summary: Hardened login security with rate limiting.
output.pm_summary: Login endpoints now enforce rate limits to reduce brute-force attempts and add clearer audit logs.
output.exec_summary: Security posture improves by reducing account takeover risk.
risks: Aggressive limits could affect legitimate high-volume clients.

input.diff_summary: Reorganized billing code without functional changes.

output.short_summary: Refactored billing modules for maintainability with no functional change.
output.pm_summary: This refactor improves code structure and readability; no user-facing behavior changes.
output.exec_summary: Internal code quality improvement with no immediate business impact.
risks: Refactor may introduce regressions; monitor billing errors.

input.pr_description: Adjust pricing page text for clarity.
input.diff_summary: Updated pricing page copy and headings.

output.short_summary: Improved clarity of pricing page copy.
output.pm_summary: Pricing page messaging is clearer, which may reduce buyer confusion.
output.exec_summary: Copy clarity could marginally improve conversion.

input.pr_description: Allow users to export report data to CSV.
input.diff_summary: Added CSV export endpoint and UI button.

output.short_summary: Added CSV export for report data.
output.pm_summary: Users can now export reports as CSV, supporting offline analysis and integration.
output.exec_summary: Export capability improves product stickiness and supports enterprise workflows.
risks: Large exports may increase load; monitor usage.
output.customer_impact: Customers can export reports for external analysis.

input.pr_title: Reduce image sizes on landing page
input.pr_description: Compress hero images to improve load time.
input.diff_summary: Optimized image assets and added responsive sizes.

output.short_summary: Improved landing page speed by optimizing images.
output.pm_summary: Smaller image assets reduce initial page load time and improve perceived performance.
output.exec_summary: Faster landing pages can improve top-of-funnel conversion.

input.pr_title: Add audit logging for admin changes
input.diff_summary: Added audit log entries for admin config changes.

output.short_summary: Added audit logging for admin actions.
output.pm_summary: Admin changes are now recorded for compliance and troubleshooting.
output.exec_summary: Audit logging improves compliance readiness and risk mitigation.
risks: Log volume may increase storage usage.

input.pr_description: Remove unused flag to reduce complexity.
input.diff_summary: Deleted unused feature flag code paths.

output.short_summary: Removed unused feature flag for cleaner code paths.
output.pm_summary: This cleanup reduces complexity and potential confusion without changing behavior.
output.exec_summary: Internal cleanup with no immediate business impact.
